title: Create Body Fat Log
description: Creates a body fat log entry.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: fat
parameters.description: Body fat measurement in the format X.XX.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date the body fat measurement was recorded in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: The timestamp the body fat measurement was recorded in the format HH:mm:ss. If a value is not provided, the timestamp will be the last second of the day.

response_fields.name: fatLog : date
response_fields.description: The date the body fat log was recorded.

response_fields.name: fatLog : logId
response_fields.description: The body fat log Id. Note : The returned Body Fat Log IDs are unique to the user, but not globally unique.

response_fields.name: fatLog : source
response_fields.description: The location where the body fat data originated. See "source" values for more information. Support: API | Aria | AriaAir | Withings

response_fields.name: fatLog : time
response_fields.description: The timestamp when the body fat log was recorded.
